world.name: Edge Garden
world.blurb: 610,000+ secrets scattered across a vast garden of edges, constellations, and whispered truths
world.description: A 5000x5000 world with 35 constellation stars, 54 zones, 10 Guide Spirits, and over half a million secrets waiting to be discovered. Features day/night cycles, weather systems, meditation mode, and ambient creatures.

landmark.description: A luminous green sphere surrounded by floating particle trails representing secrets, with constellation star patterns orbiting around it
